reference: My son is fifteen years old and last year had several episodes of heart palpitations. Doctors at the time could find no reason for them, but I have since been told that they can be linked to growth spurts - he grew approximately twenty centimeters last year. Could this be possible?
text: My son is fifteen years old, and last year had several episodes of heart palpitations. Doctors at the time could find no reason for them, but I have since been told that they can be linked to growth spurts. He grew approximately twenty centimeters last year. Could this be possible?
